name: Plantation Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the lamb-stew meat and brown on all sides, turning occasionally until well-colored.
3. Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
4. In the same pot, add the chicken stock and bring to a simmer.
5. Return the lamb to the pot and stir gently.
6. Simmer for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
7. Add the cubed potatoes and diced red bell peppers to the pot.
8. Continue simmering for an additional 1/2 hour until the vegetables are tender.
9. Stir in the vinegar, lemon juice, orange juice, Lea & Perrins, parsley, and sherry just before serving.
10. Serve hot and enjoy your flavorful Plantation Stew.
